# Agent_Coding Framework v3.0

> Enterprise-grade AI Multi-Agent Development Framework

## Overview

Agent_Coding is a comprehensive framework for orchestrating multiple AI agents 
(Gemini, Claude, GPT, Grok) to work as a cohesive Product Development team.

## Key Features

- 19 Specialized Agents for different roles
- Context persistence across sessions
- 80+ Commands for development workflows
- Meta-System for creating new components
- UltraThink deep reasoning mode
- Proactive internet research integration
- 10 Core workflows

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](README.md)
- [User Guide (Vietnamese)](docs/playbook_vi/HUONG_DAN_SU_DUNG.md)
- [Command Reference](docs/playbook_vi/COMMAND_REFERENCE.md)
- [Full Documentation](llms-full.txt)

## Quick Start

1. Copy framework to your project
2. Run `/start-session` in your AI IDE
3. Use `/cook [feature]` to develop features

## Commands

### Orchestration
- `/start-session` - Initialize session
- `/handover` - Handover before closing
- `/status` - Show status

### Development
- `/cook [feature]` - Full feature workflow
- `/plan [feature]` - Create plan
- `/code [task]` - Implement
- `/test` - Run tests

### v3.0 Features
- `/ultrathink [problem]` - Deep reasoning
- `/search:github [query]` - Search GitHub
- `/meta:skill [name]` - Create skill
- `/chain feature [desc]` - Workflow chain

## Agents

19 specialized agents including: Solution Architect, Tech Lead, 
Fullstack, Backend, Frontend, API, Database, Web, UI/UX, QA, 
DevOps, PM, Security, Performance, Researcher, Brainstormer, 
Scout, Git Manager, Docs Manager
